content.text:
<user_query>
You need to fix /deploy-fuyao queue routing sending jobs to rc-perception instead of rc-wbc and then re-submit current job. Check required deterministic steps: queue semantics, branch sync, confirmation, and command compatibility. Suggest exact minimal edits and deployment command adjustments.
</user_query>

yes. I updated the routing logic so deployment goes to `rc-wbc` by default and made the queue argument safer against legacy `rc-perception` overrides.

- I changed `humanoid-gym/scripts/fuyao_deploy.sh` to:
  - default queue to `rc-wbc-4090` instead of implicit `4090` mapping to `rc-perception-4090`;
  - map `4090`/`rc-wbc`/`rc-perception` forms to `rc-wbc-4090` and `l20`/`rc-perception-l20` to `rc-wbc-l20`;
  - move script-owned `--queue="${queue_name}"` to the end of the `fuyao deploy` argument list so legacy `--fuyao-args="--queue=..."` no longer overrides the canonical routing.
- I updated `humanoid-gym/scripts/fuyao_deploy.sh` usage/help text and examples to reflect `rc-wbc` queue targets and keep CLI compatibility with both shorthand and full queue names.
- Exact deterministic resubmit commands to run (after you confirm task/experiment/label):
  1. `git checkout <branch>`  
  2. `git push -u origin <branch>`
  3. `SSH_ALIAS="Huh8.remote_kernel.fuyao"; if ! ssh -o BatchMode=yes -o ConnectTimeout=5 "${SSH_ALIAS}" "echo ok" >/dev/null 2>&1; then SSH_ALIAS="remote.kernel.fuyo"; fi`
  4. `ssh "${SSH_ALIAS}" 'set -euo pipefail; cd /root/motion_rl; git fetch origin; git checkout <branch>; git reset --hard origin/<branch>; exit'`
  5. `/deploy-fuyao --branch <branch> --project rc-wbc --task <task> --experiment <experiment> --label <label> --queue rc-wbc-4090 --site fuyao_sh_n2 --yes`

If you want, share the exact last `/deploy-fuyao ...` command and I will provide the exact one-line re-submit command with only queue-related edits applied.

not doable
